title: Represented governing standard (mu-tilde) record (R7C, Decision 0028)
description: An actor/institution's represented, adopted, or embodied version of a governing standard. Typed with identity, stance, fidelity, and lineage so it is never conflated with the normative metaortheme type (mu) or the case-bound metaorthemma (mu-bar). RepMeta is many-to-many: one represented standard may combine several metaortheme types; one type may have many represented versions.

represented_metaortheme_types.description: RepMeta_A: the normative metaortheme type(s) this standard represents (many-to-many)

stance.description: the carrier's stance toward the represented content; mention/quotation is not endorsement, and a carrier token is not automatically a faithful instance

lineage.description: prior represented-standard ids this one derives from (mutation/inheritance)
